articles.title: Neoen/Statkraft/Zenobē/Infranode儲能項目進展 (歐洲)
keyPoints: Statkraft愛爾蘭首個4小時儲能上線：20MW/80MWh
4小時儲能系統成為歐洲新標準
articles.originalContent: A flurry of BESS project news from big-name players in Northern Europe with Neoen, Statkraft, Zenobē and Infranode moving projects forward.

articles.originalContent: Recent developments from India's emerging energy storage sector highlight a broadening of interest in diverse technologies and applications.

articles.title: NSW政府解決2033-34容量缺口 (澳洲)
keyPoints: NSW能源部長指令ASL解決容量缺口
澳洲家庭儲能預算大幅增加
家用儲能改變電網形態
articles.originalContent: New South Wales (NSW) energy minister Penny Sharpe has directed ASL to deliver a firming capacity tender addressing forecast energy shortfalls from 2033-34.

articles.title: 🇺🇸 美國》NTPC Gujarat太陽能項目並網
keyPoints: NTPC在Gujarat的Khavda-II太陽能項目已並網165MW
印度太陽能市場持續擴張
美國Occidental三個145MW太陽能項目上線
articles.originalContent: NTPC has commissioned 165MW of solar capacity at its 1.25GW Khavda-II solar project in Gujarat.
